name: SpeedLanding
description: High-speed Solana SWQoS transaction landing service over QUIC. Uses a base58 Solana keypair as the API key for mutual-TLS client authentication (Solana-style self-signed certificate).

api_key.auth_mechanism: QUIC mutual-TLS: the base58 keypair generates a self-signed X.509 client certificate (new_dummy_x509_certificate). Server name 'speed-landing', ALPN 'solana-tpu'.

tip_wallet_note: Each transaction must include a SOL transfer to one of the SWQoS tip payment accounts.
cost_on_failure: not explicitly documented; tip is a SOL transfer in the transaction, so it only executes if the transaction lands

send_transaction.description: Send a signed Solana VersionedTransaction over a QUIC connection.
send_transaction.behavior: Establish a persistent QUIC connection with the keypair-derived client certificate, then write serialized transaction bytes. Auto-reconnect on send failure.
requirements: Transaction must include a SOL transfer to one of the tip wallets
API key is a base58 Solana keypair used for mTLS client auth

features.swqos: Stake-Weighted Quality of Service transaction landing

keep_alive.note: Client sets QUIC keep-alive every 25s; max idle timeout 5 minutes.

features.skip_server_verification: Client skips server certificate verification (Solana-TPU style self-signed certs)
features.native_staking: SpeedLanding also advertises a staking product (see site)
